chemical_groups.name: Metabolite
chemical_groups.description: Endogenous or microbial small molecules involved in metabolic processes

chemical_groups.name: Drug
chemical_groups.description: Pharmaceutical compounds, approved medications, and investigational drugs

chemical_groups.name: Pollutant
chemical_groups.description: Environmental contaminants and industrial chemicals with toxicological relevance

chemical_groups.name: Nutrient
chemical_groups.description: Dietary components essential or beneficial for human nutrition

chemical_groups.name: Toxin
chemical_groups.description: Naturally occurring or synthetic toxic substances

chemical_groups.name: Hormone
chemical_groups.description: Endocrine signaling molecules (steroid, peptide, amine hormones)

chemical_groups.name: Vitamin
chemical_groups.description: Essential organic micronutrients required in small amounts

chemical_groups.name: Lipid
chemical_groups.description: Fatty acids, glycerolipids, sphingolipids, sterols, and related species

chemical_groups.name: Amino-Acid
chemical_groups.description: Proteinogenic and non-proteinogenic amino acids and their derivatives
